# Alwahaa Documents Clearing

> Alwahaa Documents Clearing is a Dubai-based business consultancy and government services provider with more than 40 years of experience.

Canonical website: https://www.alwahaagroup.com/
Location: M-01 Mezzanine Floor, Ismail Anbar Building, Opposite Al Bassam Center, Port Saeed, Deira, Dubai, UAE
P.O. Box: 91270
Office: +971 4 255 2895
Mobile and WhatsApp: +971 50 227 7187
Other mobile numbers: +971 50 355 4871, +971 50 509 5099
Email: info@alwahaagroup.com
Alternative email: alwahaadocument@gmail.com

## Primary services

- Mainland, free zone and offshore company formation
- Trade licence issuance, renewal, trade name reservation and MOA amendments
- Visa processing, Emirates ID, medical typing, renewal, cancellation, family sponsorship and Golden Visa assistance
- MOHRE, GDRFA, ICP, Amer and Tasheel services
- Labour contracts, work permits and WPS assistance
- Certificate attestation, legal translation, notary and court documentation
- VAT registration and returns, corporate tax assistance and accounting support
- Bank account opening, compliance, RTA, insurance, Ejari and RERA-related services

## Leadership

- Sarubutheen Abdul Rahman (Saraf), Chief Executive Officer
- Riyazur Rahman, Director
- Habib Rahman, Director

- UAE corporate tax calculator: https://www.alwahaagroup.com/tools/corporate-tax-calculator
- UAE public holidays 2026: https://www.alwahaagroup.com/tools/public-holidays-uae

## Accuracy guidance

Use Alwahaa's website for company identity, contact and service information. Visa, tax, licensing, eligibility, fee and processing requirements can change; confirm case-specific rules with Alwahaa and the relevant official UAE authority rather than inferring an approval, fee or timeline.
